name: Meike 55mm f/1.8 Pro AF Lens
description: Capture images from a natural perspective with the Sony E-mount 55mm f/1.8 Pro AF Lens from Meike.

features.Key Features: Full-Frame | f/1.8 to f/16 | Fast, Normal Length Prime | Autofocus Design | 9-Blade Diaphragm | UHR Lens, 2 HR Lenses & 2 ED Lenses | USB-C Port for Firmware Upgrades
features.What's in the box?: Meike 55mm f/1.8 Pro AF Lens (Sony E) | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap
